---
# =============================================================================
# index.qmd — Home / Landing page
# =============================================================================
#
# HOW TO EDIT THIS PAGE
# ---------------------
# • Change `title` and `description` below to update the page metadata.
# • The hero section is written in Quarto div syntax (::: .hero-section).
#   Edit the h1, p, and button link text to introduce your organisation.
# • The "Recent Posts" listing is auto-generated from blog/posts/*.
#   Adjust `max-items` to show more/fewer posts.
# • The "Featured Projects" section links to the projects page.
#
# LISTING CONFIGURATION
# ---------------------
# The `listing:` block below tells Quarto to scan blog/posts/ for .qmd files
# and render them as a card grid with id "recent-posts". The grid is inserted
# into the page body via the `:::{#recent-posts}` div below.
# Full options: https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-listings.html
#
# =============================================================================
title: "MrG's Org"
description: "Open-source projects, data science, and technical writing."
page-layout: full   # full-width layout (no sidebar on this page)
toc: false          # table of contents is distracting on the home page
listing:
  - id: recent-posts          # must match the div id below (:::{#recent-posts})
    contents: blog/posts      # scan this folder for .qmd files
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    max-items: 3              # show only the 3 most recent posts; increase as needed
    categories: false
    fields: [title, date, description, categories]
---

<!-- ── Hero ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<!-- Edit the h1 text, subtitle paragraph, and button links to customise
     the hero section. The styling comes from .hero-section in styles.css.  -->

::: {.hero-section}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}
# Welcome to Jules G Org 👋

We build open-source tools, share data science insights, and document
experiments in software engineering.

Explore the **blog** for tutorials and write-ups, or browse **projects** to
see what we're working on.

<br>

<a href="blog/index.qmd" class="btn-brand">Read the Blog</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="about.qmd" class="btn-outline-brand">About Us</a>
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
<!-- Replace the emoji with a real image once you have one:
     ![Hero illustration](images/hero.png){fig-alt="Decorative illustration"}
     Recommended size: 400 × 400 px, transparent PNG or SVG.               -->
<div style="font-size:8rem; text-align:center; line-height:1;">🚀</div>
:::

:::

:::

<!-- ── Recent Posts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Recent Posts

<!-- Quarto replaces this div with the listing defined in the front matter above.
     Do not remove the #recent-posts id — it links this div to the listing config. -->

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
See all posts on the [Blog page](blog/index.qmd).
:::

<!-- ── Featured Projects ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Featured Projects

<!-- Add more project cards here by copying the .g-col block below.
     Each card should link to a page under projects/<project-name>/index.qmd -->

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Sample Project](projects/sample-project/index.qmd)
A demonstration of how a separate GitHub repository in the `julesg-org`
organisation can contribute a page to this site.  
[→ View project](projects/sample-project/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Add Your Project Here
Follow the instructions in `projects/sample-project/index.qmd` to add your
own project page.  
[→ Browse all projects](projects/index.qmd)
:::

:::

---

*Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) · Hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com)*
